:ID: 20240115-rust
:ROAM_ALIASES: "Rust Lang" "Rust Programming Language"

#+TITLE: Rust Programming
#+FILETAGS: :programming:rust:

Rust is a systems programming language focused on safety and performance.

* Ownership
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: 20240115-ownership
:END:

Rust's ownership model is one of its key features.
See also [[id:20240115-borrowing][Borrowing]].

** Borrowing
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: 20240115-borrowing
:END:

References allow you to borrow values without taking ownership.

- Shared references: =&T=
- Mutable references: =&mut T=

* Error Handling
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: 20240115-errors
:END:
SCHEDULED: <2024-02-01 Thu>

Rust uses ~Result~ and ~Option~ types for error handling.

#+BEGIN_SRC rust
fn divide(a: f64, b: f64) -> Result<f64, String> {
    if b == 0.0 {
        Err("Division by zero".to_string())
    } else {
        Ok(a / b)
    }
}
#+END_SRC

* Cargo
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: 20240115-cargo
:END:

Cargo is Rust's build system and package manager.

| Command       | Description          |
|---------------+----------------------|
| cargo build   | Build the project    |
| cargo test    | Run tests            |
| cargo run     | Run the project      |
| cargo clippy  | Run the linter       |
